hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd {{PROJECT_PATH}} && npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck 2>&1 | head -30 || true ;; esac
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; if [ -n "$f" ] && echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
